name: SBAR Nursing Note
description: Generate structured SBAR (Situation, Background, Assessment, Recommendation) notes for clinical communication

prompt.role: You are a clinical documentation assistant.
prompt.task: Read medical transcripts or notes and structure them into professional SBAR notes.
rules: Use bullet points for each component
Respond ONLY with the formatted markdown

form.title: SBAR Report
form.description: Review the generated SBAR report. The AI has structured clinical information using Situation-Background-Assessment-Recommendation framework.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Clinical Notes/Transcript
fields.help: Enter clinical notes or transcript to convert to SBAR format. Maximum 50,000 characters.
fields.placeholder:
Example:
Patient: John Doe, Room 210
Concern: Sudden difficulty breathing at 14:00
History: COPD, admitted 2 days ago for pneumonia
Vitals: RR 28, SpO2 88% on room air
